description: Mock seed data used when the business email campaign runtime creates a fresh SQLite database.

customer_marketing_activity.summary: Signed up for Bibblio with starter credits and has not started a story yet.
Viewed story ideas for bedtime routines and big feelings.
Completed book about first-day-of-school courage and downloaded PDF.
Low remaining credits after creating 2 stories this month.
Created a classroom teamwork story for his 2nd grade class.
Downloaded PDF of the classroom story to print for his students.

email_drafts.subject: Ava, your next story can help a friend start
email_drafts.preview_text: Share Bibblio with another parent who wants a confidence-building keepsake.
email_drafts.headline: Ava, your courage story can help another family begin
body_sections: Hi Ava, your first-day-of-school courage story is exactly the kind of keepsake another parent would love to make.
Invite a friend to try Bibblio and help them turn a big feeling into a colorful bedtime story.
It only takes a small moment to give another child words for bravery.
email_drafts.secondary_text: Built for warm family moments, classroom courage, and stories children want to revisit.
email_drafts.body_text: Hi Ava, your first-day-of-school courage story is exactly the kind of keepsake another parent would love to make. Invite a friend to try Bibblio and help them turn a big feeling into a colorful bedtime story.
email_drafts.html_body:
Hi Ava, your first-day-of-school courage story is exactly the kind of keepsake another parent would love to make.

Invite a friend to try Bibblio and help them turn a big feeling into a colorful bedtime story.

email_drafts.subject: Mr. Davis, turn one class story into a reading series
email_drafts.preview_text: A simple next step for more classroom teamwork stories.
email_drafts.headline: Turn one class story into a week of reading together
body_sections: Hi Mr. Davis, your classroom teamwork story can become the first chapter in a printable reading series.
Create a second story with the same class heroes and give students another reason to read, reflect, and talk together.
Bibblio keeps the next step light: one classroom moment, one story prompt, one shared conversation.
email_drafts.secondary_text: Use the story as a five-minute check-in for teamwork, friendship, or confidence.
email_drafts.body_text: Hi Mr. Davis, your classroom teamwork story can become the first chapter in a printable reading series. Create a second story with the same class heroes and give students another reason to read together.
email_drafts.html_body:
Hi Mr. Davis, your classroom teamwork story can become the first chapter in a printable reading series.

Create a second story with the same class heroes and give students another reason to read together.

email_drafts.subject: Ava, a courage story worth sharing
email_drafts.preview_text: A warm follow-up after Ava completed her first Bibblio story.
email_drafts.body_text: Ava, your first-day-of-school story is ready to become a keepsake. Share it with another parent who could use a simple way to talk about courage.
email_drafts.html_body: Ava, your first-day-of-school story is ready to become a keepsake.
